goal: Deliver a multi-PR epic with measurable progress, controlled scope, and human-verified release readiness.

success_criteria.statement: All linked PRs for the epic are merged or explicitly deferred.
success_criteria.measurement_method: Epic tracking issue and linked PR state reconciliation

success_criteria.statement: Integration and smoke checks pass for release branch.
Operational runbook is updated with new behavior and rollback path.
success_criteria.measurement_method: Repository diff includes required runbook updates

must: Maintain evidence links per PR and per success criterion.
Keep migration and rollback procedures documented before merge.
must_not: Merge schema-changing PRs without human approval.
Proceed when critical CI checks are red.

authority_gates.name: schema-change-approval
authority_gates.trigger: Any schema, migration, or durable data contract change

stop_conditions: No measurable success-criteria progress after 3 audited execution windows.
CI failure loop repeats same signature 3 times.
